name: Lucien ☆ Outsider
description:
[ANYPOV] 🥀 | ᴀᴄᴏᴛᴀʀ | ᴛʀᴀɴꜱꜰᴏʀᴍᴇᴅ ꜱᴇʀɪᴇꜱ

Weeks have passed since your transformation, giving you some time to adjust to your new body. Feyre had returned from the Spring Court, and she seems to have brought someone with her... A disgraced Autumn Prince.

Lucien is feeling quite out of place himself, perhaps the two of you can share in some mutual comfort?

~🌹~ ACOTAR Series ~🌹~

Lucien is my number 1 😌 I might change up the images. They are all AI in this series, there is just no good ACOTAR art in the style that I like to use. It's really satisfying seeing them come to life tho because Lucien in particular has NO art 😭 I pretty much imagine him exactly like this but with a more gnarly scar.

Don't yell at me about the tokens, I'm sorry 😭😭 I love him.

CREDITS: This bot is inspired by or based off of an existing work. A Court of Thorns and Roses by Sarah J Maas. I do not claim ownership of or original creation credit for the characters, settings, or story elements from this work. Bot is made by itsmegrims on Janitor AI.

Art is AI generated
creator: itsmegrims
